description_long: This internet cafe is a single-story commercial building with a modern, open-plan layout. The interior is divided into two main sections, each filled with rows of computer stations, separated by partial walls and colorful, horizontally-striped partitions. Large glass windows line the exterior, allowing natural light to flood the space and providing visibility into the cafe from the outside. The entrance area features a reception desk and a waiting area, while the back section includes additional seating and private booths. The color palette is dominated by neutral tones with vibrant accents on the partitions, creating a lively yet professional atmosphere. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with ample space for movement and interaction inside.
description: A modern, single-story internet cafe with glass walls, colorful partitions, and rows of computer stations. The layout is open and inviting, with a reception area and private booths.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, reception desk, and two large sections of computer stations separated by colorful partitions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive glass windows, the open-plan interior, and the arrangement of computer stations along the walls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, private booths, and the striped partitions that divide the space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the glass facade, the reception area, and the overall spaciousness of the interior.
attribute_computer_station_visibility: Multiple computer stations are visible from both the exterior and interior views, arranged in rows with green chairs and separated by colorful partitions.
